metadata.description: A CLAUDE.md and a startup evaluator skill that make Claude Code think like a founder. Inspired by publicly discussed Sam Altman principles.

plugins.name: altman-mode
plugins.description: Make Claude Code stop hedging. A CLAUDE.md that forces leverage, shipping speed, AI-as-product thinking, safety-by-design, and direct answers — plus a brutal startup evaluator that scores ideas out of 100.
